ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Chilli Sauce (53%) [Tomatoes (41%) (Purée & Diced), Red Capsicum, Onion (2.9%), Concentrated White Vinegar, Salt, Spices, Maize Thickener (1422), Chilli Flakes (0.4%), Red Chillies (0.4%), Brown Sugar, Sugar, Honey, Garlic Paste, Food Acid (330), Mineral Salt (509)], Bean Mix (47%) (Red Kidney Beans, Black Beans). May Contain: Soy.
